ddls:
CREATE TABLE "bike_rentals" (
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user renting the bike */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being rented */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rental starts */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* Timestamp when the rental ends */,
  "duration" REAL /* Duration of the rental in minutes */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the rental occurred */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Weather condition at the time of rental */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the bike was rented */,
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* ID of the holiday during which the rental occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_weather_condition FOREIGN KEY ("weather_condition") REFERENCES weather_data ("weather_condition"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_rentals_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the user */,
  "membership_type" TEXT /* Type of membership (e.g., regular, premium) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bikes" (
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the bike */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the bike is currently located */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the bike (e.g., available, in maintenance) */,
  "bike_type" TEXT /* Type of bike (e.g., mountain, city) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weather_data" (
  "weather_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each weather record */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the weather observation */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the observation was made */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature in degrees Celsius */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity percentage */,
  "windspeed" REAL /* Speed of the wind in km/h */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the weather (e.g., clear, mist) */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation in mm */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("weather_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_name" TEXT /* Name of the season (e.g., winter, spring) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "holidays" (
  "holiday_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each holiday */,
  "holiday_name" TEXT /* Name of the holiday */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the holiday */,
  "type" TEXT /* Type of holiday (e.g., national, regional) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("holiday_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_stats" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental statistic record */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the stats are recorded */,
  "total_rentals" INTEGER /* Total number of rentals during the season */,
  "avg_duration" REAL /* Average duration of rentals in minutes */,
  "weather_condition" TEXT /* Common weather condition during the season */,
  "num_holidays" INTEGER /* Number of holidays during the season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_stats_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback submission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing feedback */,
  "rental_id" INTEGER /* ID of the rental transaction related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating provided by the user (1-5 scale) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments from the user regarding their experience */,
  "feedback_date" TEXT /* Date when the feedback was submitted */,
  "satisfaction_level" TEXT /* Level of satisfaction (e.g., very satisfied, neutral) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_rental_id FOREIGN KEY ("rental_id") REFERENCES bike_rentals ("rental_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each bike station */,
  "station_name" TEXT /* Name of the bike rental station */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the station */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Total number of bikes the station can hold */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the station's location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the station's location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike being maintained */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance performed */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date when the maintenance was done */,
  "cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_maintenance_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "bike_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike related to the alert */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., maintenance needed, theft risk) */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was created */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates if the alert has been resolved */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority level of the alert (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_bike_alerts_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payment_methods" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the payment */,
  "payment_type" TEXT /* Type of payment (e.g., credit card, cash) */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payment_methods_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "route_data" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user taking the route */,
  "bike_id" INTEGER /* ID of the bike used for the route */,
  "start_location" TEXT /* Starting location of the route */,
  "end_location" TEXT /* Ending location of the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route in kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_data_bike_id FOREIGN KEY ("bike_id") REFERENCES bikes ("bike_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_route_data_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
